person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
John Talbot, 1st Baron Lisle and 1st Viscount Lisle (c. 1426 – 17 July 1453), English nobleman and medieval soldier, was the son of John Talbot, 1st Earl of Shrewsbury, and his second wife Margaret Beauchamp.

Titles
Talbot was already a knight when, on 26 July 1444, he was created Lord and Baron Lisle of Kingston Lisle in Berkshire by Henry VI, his mother being one of the co-heirs to the previous creation of the barony. He stood to inherit much of her estates in Wales on the Welsh Marches, and in Gloucestershire at Painswick. She had fought long and hard to enfranchise her son for the duration of the Berkeley feud, in which the young nobleman's manor house was raided by Lord Berkeley's brothers. After 1449, his mother was one of three co-heiresses to her father, and through her, he possessed a claim on Berkeley Castle. In 1451, already a veteran of the fight at St Barnets Green, he was created Viscount Lisle.

In prosecution of the claim against James Berkeley, 1st Baron Berkeley, the heir-male, he stormed Berkeley Castle in 1452 and took the Baron and his sons prisoner.

Ordered to recruit reinforcements for the English army in France, he found 2325 men at Dartmouth and Plymouth before embarkation on 5 March 1453. He was joined by the Lords Moleyns and Camoys, as he led troops into Guyenne to reinforce his father. They sailed to Bordeaux but still the English army numbered only 8,000, facing an enemy force of 10,000. They were still awaiting reinforcements when they marched out, capturing an outpost at St Laurent on 17 July 1453. That day they fought the last pitched battle of the Hundred Years' War at Castillon. Both father and son were killed during the battle. Some chroniclers assert that when his wounded and unhorsed father begged him to quit the field and save himself, he refused, preferring death to dishonour; a scene memorialized by William Shakespeare in Henry VI, Part I, Act IV, Scene VI.

Marriage and issue
He married Joan Cheddar (b. c. 1425), the daughter of Thomas Chedder, Esquire and the widow of Richard Stafford in 1443 and had three children:

1. Elizabeth Talbot (d. 1487), married Edward Grey, Baron Ferrers of Groby. Grey later inherited the title of Baron Lisle, through Elizabeth.
2. Thomas Talbot, 2nd Viscount Lisle (c. 1449–1470)
3. Margaret Talbot (d. 1475), 1st wife of Sir George Vere (d. 1503), son of John de Vere, 12th Earl of Oxford

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Talbot,_1st_Viscount_Lisle

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Talbot III 1st Viscount Lisle於1426年12月12日出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利時，他的父親Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury42歲，母親Margaret Beauchamp22歲。他於大約1443年與Joan Cheddar在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1453年7月17日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾享年26歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Talbot III 1st Viscount Lisle was born on 12 December 1426, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury, was 42 and his mother, Margaret Beauchamp, was 22. He married Joan Cheddar about 1443, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 17 July 1453, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 26, and was buried in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Talbot III 1st Viscount Lisle est né le 12 décembre 1426, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret Beauchamp, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan Cheddar environ 1443, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1453, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Talbot III 1st Viscount Lisle am 12. Dezember 1426 in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury 42 und seine Mutter Margaret Beauchamp 22. Er hat um 1443 in England Joan Cheddar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Juli 1453 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Talbot III 1st Viscount Lisle è nato il il 12 dicembre 1426 nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Beauchamp, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan Cheddar circa 1443, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 luglio 1453, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolto a Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Talbot III 1st Viscount Lisleが1426年12月12日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsburyは42歳，母Margaret Beauchampは22歳であった。約1443年にイギリスでJoan Cheddarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1453年7月17日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで26歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Talbot III 1st Viscount Lisle(이)가 1426년 12월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Beauchamp(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1443년 영국에서 Joan Cheddar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1453년 7월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 워크소프에 묻혔다.

pt.12 December 1426–17 July 1453: 12 de dezembro de 1426–17 de julho de 1453
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Talbot III 1st Viscount Lisle nasceu em 12 de dezembro de 1426, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Beauchamp, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Cheddar aproximadamente 1443, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1453, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 26 anos, e foi sepultado em Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Talbot III 1st Viscount Lisle родился 12 декабря 1426 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Beauchamp, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Cheddar около 1443 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 июля 1453 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.12 December 1426–17 July 1453: 12 de diciembre de 1426–17 de julio de 1453
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Talbot III 1st Viscount Lisle nació el 12 de diciembre de 1426, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margaret Beauchamp, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joan Cheddar aproximadamente 1443, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de julio de 1453, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultado en Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
